title: Briefcase
description: Canonical kernel input produced by Concierge. Schema-closed, no telemetry allowed.

run_id.description: Unique execution identifier for this governance run.

claim_id.description: Unique identifier for the claim being evaluated.

claim_type.description: Claim classification that determines obligation routing.

repo_state.description: Optional provenance; DIRTY means working tree differs from code_version.

required_obligations.description: Canonical set of obligations Mayor will enforce. Must be sorted by name for determinism.

requested_tests.description: What Factory should execute to generate attestations.

kill_switch_policies.description: Hard-stop policies evaluated by Mayor (or pre-Mayor) as deterministic rules.

metadata.description: Optional non-sovereign metadata for audit trail only. Never used in decision logic.

type.description: Type of obligation determines expected evidence format.

severity.description: HARD obligations block SHIP if unsatisfied. SOFT are advisory only.

required_evidence.description: List of evidence artifacts required to satisfy this obligation.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this obligation requires.

obligation_name.description: Must match an obligation name in required_obligations.

test_command.description: Command or test identifier that Factory will execute.

attestor.description: Expected attestor that will execute this test.
